inputs.label: Power (Watts)
inputs.businessContext: Input power in watts (e.g., electrical device rating).

businessContext_i18n.en: Input power in watts (e.g., electrical device rating).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Watt cinsinden giriş gücü (örneğin, elektrikli cihaz değeri).

inputs.label: Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of power application in seconds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of power application in seconds.

inputs.label: Joules per calorie
inputs.businessContext: Energy equivalent: 4.184 J per small calorie, 4184 J per kilocalorie (dietary Calorie).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy equivalent: 4.184 J per small calorie, 4184 J per kilocalorie (dietary Calorie).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji eşdeğeri: 1 küçük kalori için 4.184 J, 1 kilokalori (diyet Kalorisi) için 4184 J.

inputs.label: Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion efficiency from electrical power to heat/calories. 100% means all watts converted.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion efficiency from electrical power to heat/calories. 100% means all watts converted.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrik gücünden ısıya/kaloriye dönüşüm verimliliği. %100, tüm wattların dönüştürüldüğü anlamına gelir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
